claimText: Tamil Nadu has notified the Greater Flamingo Sanctuary at Dhanushkodi to preserve a critical stopover point along the Central Asian Flyway.
evidenceExcerpt: Tamil Nadu notified Greater Flamingo Sanctuary at Dhanushkodi to preserve a critical stopover point along Central Asian Flyway.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent sanctuary notifications or flyways.

claimText: Greater Flamingos breed in shallow wetlands that are either saline or alkaline.
evidenceExcerpt: Breeds in shallow wetlands that are either saline or alkaline...
examUse: Statement-based question on habitat preferences of specific bird species.

claimText: The Kachchh Desert Wildlife Sanctuary in Gujarat supports South Asia's only breeding ground of Greater Flamingos.
evidenceExcerpt: Kachchh Desert Wildlife Sanctuary in Great Rann of Kachchh (GRK) in Gujarat, is a unique Protected Area, supporting South Asia's only breeding ground of Greater Flamingos...
examUse: Fact-based question on unique breeding grounds in South Asia.

claimText: Greater Flamingos are highly philopatric, meaning they tend to return to or remain near a particular site.
evidenceExcerpt: Characteristics: Great dispersal capacity outside breeding season, highly philopatric...
examUse: Statement-based question on species characteristics and terminology.

claimText: The Greater Flamingo is listed as Least Concern (LC) on the IUCN Red List and is included in CITES Appendix II.
evidenceExcerpt: Conservation Status: CITES: Appendix II. IUCN Status: LC (Least Concern).
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on species conservation status.
